channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ndindi Nyoro Questions Transparency in Fuel Pricing and Calls for Accountability
item.description: Kiharu MP Ndindi Nyoro has expressed serious concerns over Kenya's fuel pricing and distribution system, highlighting a lack of transparency and accountability. Speaking to journalists on April 14, 20...

item.title: Canberra Stadium's Turf Issues Fuel Upgrade Discussions
item.description: Concerns over the quality of the turf at Canberra's main stadium are escalating a long-standing debate about a potential upgrade or replacement. Recent matches have been impacted by patchy and uneven ...

item.title: Avi Lewis Proposes Ban on Personalized Pricing Using Consumer Data
item.description: Newly appointed NDP leader Avi Lewis is pushing for legislation that would prevent companies from using personal data to charge different prices to different consumers, a practice often referred to as...

item.title: Five Men Sentenced Over £1 Million Burglary Spree Using Footprint Evidence
item.description: A gang responsible for more than £1 million worth of thefts and irreplaceable heirlooms across the Midlands and northern England has been brought to justice, thanks in part to a forensic breakthrough ...

item.title: PSASB Seeks Qualified Kenyans for 13 Job Vacancies in Nairobi
item.description: The Public Sector Accounting Standards Board (PSASB) has made public a recruitment drive for 13 positions based in Nairobi. The openings include a Driver I post and twelve senior and technical roles w...

item.title: GCL’s 4Divinity to Distribute 'Windrose' Pirate Game Across Asia
item.description: GCL Global Holdings Ltd. (Nasdaq: GCL), a leading games and entertainment provider, announced that its publishing subsidiary, 4Divinity Pte. Ltd., has secured a significant distribution and publishing...

item.title: Delimitation Bill 2026 Allows Future Redrawing of Constituencies in Pakistan-Occupied J&K
item.description: The Delimitation Bill, 2026, has been introduced to authorise the Election Commission of India to carry out delimitation exercises for constituencies in Jammu and Kashmir, including the 24 seats curre...

item.title: Potentia Capital expands Storypark with acquisition of childcare software company Xap
item.description: Andrew Gray’s private equity firm, Potentia Capital, has expanded its education technology portfolio by acquiring Queensland-based childcare software company Xap. The move effectively doubles the size...

item.title: Lebanon and Israel Conduct First Direct Diplomatic Talks in Washington in Decades
item.description: Lebanon and Israel have engaged in direct diplomatic discussions in Washington, marking the first formal talks between the two nations in several decades. The dialogue represents a significant shift i...

item.title: Dele Momodu Endorses Atiku-Peter Obi Ticket as APC Shows Signs of Worry
item.description: Dele Momodu, wey be Publisher of Ovation Magazine and prominent opposition figure, don show him support for a potential presidential ticket wey go join Atiku Abubakar and Peter Obi under African Democ...

item.title: Nine nightclub workers arrested in Nairobi over alleged killing of egg vendor in CBD
item.description: Police in Nairobi have arrested nine workers from a nightclub in the city’s Central Business District over the alleged killing of a 25‑year‑old egg vendor. The man, identified as Brian Muendo, reporte...

item.title: Two protesters die in Embu as residents demand justice
item.description: Two people lost their lives in Embu County after a demonstration turned tragic. The protests reportedly began after locals accused police officers of using excessive force against residents, sparking ...

item.title: NPA Initiates Prosecutions in Life Esidimeni Tragedy After Nearly a Decade
item.description: After nearly a decade of agonising delays, the National Prosecuting Authority (NPA) has finally announced criminal prosecutions in connection with the Life Esidimeni tragedy, in which at least 141 psy...

item.title: Jalil Reflects on the Community Tragedy Caused by Marcus in Episode 7 of Blood vs Duty
item.description: In Episode 7 of 'Blood vs Duty,' the character Jalil recalls the devastating events that affected his community due to Marcus' actions. The episode delves into the personal struggles and emotional imp...

item.title: UP Government Raises Interim Wages for Noida Factory Workers Amid Ongoing Protests
item.description: In Uttar Pradesh, widespread protests erupted in Noida's industrial belt as workers demanded higher minimum wages after neighbouring Haryana raised theirs. Workers earning between ₹11,000 and ₹15,000 ...

item.title: Official Lotto Draw Results for April 14, 2026
item.description: ABS-CBN News reported the official lotto results for April 14, 2026, providing the latest winning numbers from the Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO). The article primarily serves as an info...

item.title: Oyo Speaker Denies Accepting Bribe Or Planning Makinde’s Impeachment
item.description: The Speaker of the Oyo State House of Assembly, Adebo Ogundoyin, don come out sharply deny the allegation wey talk say him collect money from some All Progressives Congress (APC) people to impeach Gov...

item.title: Understanding catastrophising: what it is and how to manage it effectively
item.description: Catastrophising is a common cognitive distortion where individuals automatically assume the worst possible outcome from a situation, often in a way that is disproportionate to the actual threat. This ...

item.title: IMF warns of global economic downturn amid Iran war and calls for de-escalation
item.description: The International Monetary Fund has issued a stark warning about the global economy in its latest World Economic Outlook, highlighting risks of recession, accelerating inflation, and potential stagfla...

item.title: David Mark-led ADC Faction Expels Nafiu Bala, Leke Abejide and Key Members at Abuja National Convention Amid Leadership Crisis
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) faction wey former Senate President David Mark dey lead don expel some top members of the party during their national convention wey hold for Abuja on Tuesday, Ap...
